text:
Hey <@&1424461167883194418>, 60 PRs merged this week. Here's what actually matters.

## Weekly Update - 2026-05-17

**💰 The Dashboard & The Money**
- The developer earnings dashboard is live.
- Added Stripe Portal auto top-up so your apps stop running out of credits while you sleep.
- Quest payouts are now automated and linked directly to your GitHub ID.

**🤖 Model Musical Chairs**
- Added `gpt-5.4-mini` and `elevenlabs flash v2.5` TTS.
- Unhid `seedream` and `seedream-pro`.
- `deepseek-v4-flash` is now routed via OpenRouter and is no longer paid-only.
- Added `mistral-4`, bumped mistral to small 3.2, and routed `qwen-vision` to the instruct variant.

**🐛 Honest Error Codes**
- We stopped taking the blame for your bad inputs. Upstream user-input errors are now properly classified as 4xx instead of 500 server errors.
- Image URL fetch failures and upstream 400s will now surface the actual error message instead of a cryptic `{}`.

**🌱 Greenhouse Explosion**
- 22 new apps added to the ecosystem this week, including MageAI, Opticode, Navaro, and Pollenforge-CLI.
